# CWE-319 — Cleartext Transmission of Sensitive Information (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-319-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/tls"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type cardPayload struct {
	Number string `json:"number"`
	CVV    string `json:"cvv"`
}

// Safe: terminates TLS before accepting cardholder data.
func StartPaymentsAPI() error {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	mux.HandleFunc("/pay", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		var p cardPayload
		_ = json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&p)
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	})
	srv := &http.Server{
		Addr:      ":8443",
		Handler:   mux,
		TLSConfig: &tls.Config{MinVersion: tls.VersionTLS12},
	}
	return srv.ListenAndServeTLS("/etc/certs/server.crt", "/etc/certs/server.key")
}
